query:
SELECT 
  companyId,
  MONTH(createdAt) as mes,
  COUNT(*) as total_vendas
FROM sales
WHERE YEAR(createdAt) = 2026 AND MONTH(createdAt) IN (1, 2)
GROUP BY companyId, MONTH(createdAt)
ORDER BY MONTH(createdAt), companyId;
